verdicts.reasoning: The center cross-sections reveal an oak-lined room and red-wool centerpiece behind the stone shell.
verdicts.comment: Your interior room has a warm detailed color pattern. Consider adding a doorway through the stone wall next.

verdicts.reasoning: The center slices reveal a red-wool centerpiece and oak furnishing inside the stone cabin shell.
verdicts.comment: Your red interior detail gives the hidden room a bold heart. Add a bright window so the cozy palette peeks outside next.

verdicts.reasoning: The cutaway views show a deliberately furnished cabin interior that exterior views alone cannot reveal.
verdicts.comment: Your cozy interior design makes the hidden room feel welcoming. Keep the warm palette and add a small window next.
